name: Enermax Technology Corporation
summary: Enermax Technology Corporation manufactures and sells PC components and peripherals worldwide. It offers power supplies; cases comprising full, mid, and mini towers; fans; air and liquid coolers; peripherals, such as monitor stands, USB fans, air guides, headset holders, blackplane modules, mobile racks, card readers, HDD enclosures, keyboards, and notebook coolers; and audio products, including speakers and earphones. The company was founded in 1990 and is based in Taoyuan, Taiwan.
